<h1>
  <samp>I'm <b>Ángel</b>!</samp> 👋
</h1>


Hello, world!

I am a **Developer** currently studying at **42** Madrid, and specializing in a **Big Data Master's**, with a background as a Higher Technician in Multiplatform Application Development.

- 🛡️ I recently wrapped up my experience as a Cybersecurity Trainer at [![Secur0][badge_secur0]](https://secur0.com/).
- 📊 I'm exploring the Data ecosystem with tools like ![Hadoop][badge_hadoop] and ![Spark][badge_spark].
- 🧩 I'm building low-level systems and algorithms with ![C][badge_c] and ![C++][badge_cpp].
- ⚙️ I'm deepening my backend expertise with ![Spring Boot][badge_spring].

### Tech & Tools Preference

[![Tech & Tools](https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=js,ts,react,astro,threejs,tailwind,bun,express,c,cpp,py,godot,git,docker,vscode,neovim,bash,regex,windows,linux,nix,notion#gh-dark-mode-only)](https://skillicons.dev)
